name: sap1
description: SAP-1 — Survivability Position Planner. Deterministic, offline, parametric planner for doctrinal combat-engineer survivability positions. Illustrative placeholder data; NOT FOR FIELD USE.

scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run check:offline
scripts.build: vite build && vite build -c vite.standalone.config.ts && node --import tsx scripts/build-standalone.ts && npm run check:offline
